steps: Go to https://calendly.com and log in (or create a free account)
Alternatively: go to Integrations (left sidebar) > API & Webhooks
Under 'Personal Access Tokens', click 'Get a token now' (if you have no existing tokens) or 'Generate new token'
Give the token a descriptive name and click 'Create Token'
Copy the token immediately — Calendly does not display it again after you close the dialog

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Calendly Personal Access Token, sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'

notes: Free plan available; webhook functionality requires a paid plan (Standard or above)
Personal Access Token is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Tokens are JWTs; they do not currently expire but can be revoked
A user token only accesses data for that user; admin/owner tokens have broader access
OAuth 2.0 is also supported for third-party app integrations — see https://developer.calendly.com/create-a-developer-account

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile including scheduling URL and timezone
